translations.An error occurred while recording your r: Hitilafu ilitokea wakati wa kurekodi jibu lako. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
translations.This link is invalid. Please use the lin: Kiungo hiki ni batili. Tafadhali tumia kiungo kutoka kwa arifa yako.
translations.This link has expired. The appointment h: Kiungo hiki kimeisha muda wake. Uteuzi tayari umekwisha.
translations.A new appointment has been created. Plea: Uteuzi mpya umeundwa. Tafadhali jibu hivi karibuni.
translations.Please check the new appointments and re: Tafadhali angalia miadi mipya na ujibu.
translations.Please respond! We still need your answe: Tafadhali jibu! Bado tunahitaji jibu lako.
Muda wa kuingia umeisha. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
translations.After granting access, return to this ap: Baada ya kutoa idhini ya kufikia, rudi kwenye programu hii
translations.Enter the domain of your Nextcloud serve: Ingiza kikoa cha seva yako ya Nextcloud ili kuanza.
translations.Nextcloud is not fully installed on this: Nextcloud haijasakinishwa kikamilifu kwenye seva hii
translations.Subscribe to your appointments in extern: Jisajili kwa miadi yako katika programu za kalenda ya nje kama vile Kalenda ya Google, Kalenda ya Apple au Thunderbird.
translations.Keep this URL private! Anyone with this: Weka URL hii kwa faragha! Mtu yeyote aliye na kiungo hiki anaweza kuona miadi yako.
translations.Regenerate Subscription URL?: Ungependa kuunda upya URL ya Usajili?
translations.This will invalidate your current calend: Hii itabatilisha URL ya usajili wako wa sasa wa kalenda. Programu zozote za kalenda zinazotumia URL ya zamani zitahitaji kusasishwa kwa kutumia URL mpya.
Chagua angalau siku moja ya wiki.
translations.Please enter an occurrence count greater: Tafadhali ingiza idadi ya matukio zaidi ya 0.
translations.Please select an end date for recurrence: Tafadhali chagua tarehe ya mwisho ya kujirudia.
Tarehe ya mwisho lazima iwe baada ya tarehe ya kuanza.
translations.Set a start date first to enable recurre: Weka tarehe ya kuanza kwanza ili kuwezesha kujirudia.
translations.Select calendar events to import as appo: Chagua matukio ya kalenda ili kuagiza kama miadi.
translations.No calendars match your search: Hakuna kalenda zinazolingana na utafutaji wako
translations.No events match your search: Hakuna matukio yanayolingana na utafutaji wako
translations.Configure attendance management and remi: Sanidi usimamizi na vikumbusho vya mahudhurio
translations.Select which groups to include in respon: Chagua ni vikundi vipi vya kujumuisha katika muhtasari wa majibu. Watumiaji walio nje ya vikundi hivi wataonekana chini ya Mengine. Acha tupu ili kujumuisha vikundi vyote.
translations.Select which teams to include in respons: Chagua timu utakazojumuisha katika muhtasari wa majibu. Washiriki wa timu watawekwa pamoja kama vikundi vya kawaida.
translations.Configure which groups can perform speci: Sanidi ni vikundi vipi vinaweza kufanya vitendo maalum. Watumiaji lazima wawe wa angalau moja ya vikundi vilivyochaguliwa ili kufikia kipengele. Ikiwa hakuna kikundi kilichochaguliwa, watumiaji wote wanaweza kufikia kipengele
translations.Groups that can create, update, and dele: Vikundi vinavyoweza kuunda, kusasisha na kufuta miadi
translations.Groups that can access the check-in inte: Vikundi vinavyoweza kufikia kiolesura cha kuingia na kutekeleza ukaguzi
translations.See response & check-in summary: Angalia majibu na muhtasari wa kuingia
translations.Groups that can see the response summary: Vikundi vinavyoweza kuona muhtasari wa majibu na muhtasari wa kuingia
translations.Groups that can see comments in the resp: Vikundi vinavyoweza kuona maoni katika muhtasari wa majibu
translations.Groups that can self-check-in via NFC st: Vikundi vinavyoweza kujisajili kupitia kibandiko cha NFC au kiungo cha kina
translations.The Notifications app is not enabled. Pl: Programu ya Arifa haijawashwa. Tafadhali iwezeshe ili kutumia vikumbusho vya miadi.
translations.You can enable it in the Apps section of: Unaweza kuiwezesha katika sehemu ya Programu ya mipangilio yako ya Nextcloud.
translations.Send reminders this many days before the: Tuma vikumbusho hivi siku nyingi kabla ya miadi (siku 1-30)
translations.How often to remind users who haven't re: Ni mara ngapi kuwakumbusha watumiaji ambao hawajajibu. Weka hadi 0 ili kukumbusha mara moja pekee, au 1-30 kurudia vikumbusho kila siku N.
translations.Automatically update attendance appointm: Sasisha miadi ya mahudhurio kiotomatiki matukio yao ya kalenda yaliyounganishwa yanaporekebishwa.
translations.Calendar sync requires Nextcloud 32 or n: Usawazishaji wa kalenda unahitaji Nextcloud 32 au mpya zaidi.
translations.This feature uses calendar event hooks t: Kipengele hiki kinatumia ndoano za matukio ya kalenda ambazo zinapatikana tu katika Nextcloud 32 na matoleo ya baadaye.
translations.When enabled, changes to calendar events: Ikiwashwa, mabadiliko kwenye matukio ya kalenda yatasasisha kiotomatiki miadi ya mahudhurio iliyounganishwa (kichwa, maelezo, tarehe/saa).
translations.Choose how appointments are displayed ac: Chagua jinsi miadi inavyoonyeshwa kwenye programu yote.
translations.Show appointment name prominently, with: Onyesha jina la miadi kwa uwazi, na tarehe ikiwa chini
translations.Show date and time prominently, with nam: Onyesha tarehe na saa kwa uwazi, jina likiwa hapa chini
translations.Are you sure you want to delete this app: Una uhakika unataka kufuta miadi hii?
translations.Error importing appointments: Hitilafu imetokea wakati wa kuingiza miadi
translations.Please select a start date and time: Tafadhali chagua tarehe na saa ya kuanza
translations.Please select an end date and time: Tafadhali chagua tarehe na saa ya mwisho
translations.End date must be after start date: Tarehe ya mwisho lazima iwe baada ya tarehe ya kuanza
translations.This appointment is linked to a calendar: Muadi huu umeunganishwa na tukio la kalenda.
translations.Changes to the calendar event will autom: Mabadiliko kwenye tukio la kalenda yatabatilisha kiotomatiki kichwa, maelezo na tarehe/saa ya miadi hii.
translations.Changes to the calendar event will not b: Mabadiliko kwenye tukio la kalenda hayatasawazishwa.
translations.Notify users who can see this appointmen: Waarifu watumiaji wanaoweza kuona miadi hii kuhusu kuundwa kwake
translations.Files that are important for this appoin: Faili ambazo ni muhimu kwa miadi hii zinaweza kuchaguliwa hapa.
translations.Limits who can see this appointment. Lea: Vikomo vya wanaoweza kuona miadi hii. Acha tupu kwa watumiaji wote.
translations.This appointment is way in the future: Miadi hii iko katika siku zijazo
translations.This appointment is way in the past: Miadi hii ni ya zamani sana
translations.Try adjusting your search or filter: Jaribu kurekebisha utafutaji wako au chujio
translations.Do you want to reset the check-in for th: Je, unataka kuweka upya muda wa kujiandikisha kwa miadi hii? Hii itaondoa maingizo yote ya kujiandikisha.
translations.Failed to regenerate subscription URL: Imeshindwa kuzalisha tena URL ya usajili
translations.URL copied to clipboard: URL imenakiliwa kwenye ubao wa kunakili
